title: Feedback-driven feature ideation loop
intent: Collect user feedback and incidents into a local ledger, then generate weekly ranked feature proposals that enter the same spec pipeline as human requests.

scenarios.description: User feedback is captured in ledger with traceable match/player context.
Weekly feature proposal report is generated and linked to telemetry evidence.

riskNotes: Risk: noisy feedback can generate low-quality proposals. Mitigation: confidence scoring and maintainer acceptance/veto controls.
